zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Constance Assenhull於1410年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾梅瑟利時，她的父親William Assenhull50歲，母親Joane de Burgh40歲。她於大約1427年與Sir Richard Waterton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國林可爾史爾可林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Constance Assenhull于1410年出生在英国英格兰越可爾梅瑟利时，她的父亲William Assenhull50岁，母亲Joane de Burgh40岁。她于大约1427年与Sir Richard Waterton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国林可爾史爾可林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Constance Assenhull was born in 1410, in Methley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Assenhull, was 50 and her mother, Joane de Burgh, was 40. She married Sir Richard Waterton about 1427. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Corringham, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Constance Assenhull est née en 1410, à Methley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Assenhull, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Joane de Burgh, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Waterton environ 1427. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Corringham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Constance Assenhull 1410 in Methley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Assenhull 50 und ihre Mutter Joane de Burgh 40. Sie hat um 1427 Sir Richard Waterton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Corringham, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Constance Assenhull è nata il nel 1410 nel Methley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Assenhull, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Joane de Burgh, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Waterton circa 1427. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Corringham, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Constance Assenhullが1410年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアメスリーで生まれた時，父William Assenhullは50歳，母Joane de Burghは40歳であった。約1427年にSir Richard Watertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスリンコルンシュアイアコリンガムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Constance Assenhull(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 멧h리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Assenhull(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane de Burgh(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1427년 Sir Richard Waterton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 링코실르 코링함에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Constance Assenhull nasceu em 1410, em Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Assenhull, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Burgh, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Waterton aproximadamente 1427. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Corringham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Constance Assenhull родилась в 1410 г. в местности метли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Assenhull было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Burgh, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Waterton около 1427 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности коррингхам, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Constance Assenhull nació en 1410, en Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Assenhull, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Joane de Burgh, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Waterton aproximadamente 1427. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Corringham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
